name: Monarch Bus Svc

Address 743 Taft St NE differs slightly from input address 676 99th Ln NE (likely terminal vs operations HQ both in Minneapolis area). BBB lists business start 1/1/2004. name: Rainbow Transportation Svc Inc
officers: Sterling N. Viets (President/Treasurer); Pamela K. Viets (Vice President/Secretary)
registry_source: CT Secretary of State entity #0563293 (via city-data mirror)
notes: USDOT 1084002 = RAINBOW TRANSPORTATION SERVICES INC, MC 422997. SAFER record now shows INACTIVE; data source (datastical/MCMIS) reports 22 power units, 25 drivers, registration expired 2021. CT entity 0563293 registered 5/22/1997 at 355 Rainbow Rd, Windsor CT; expiration 5/22/2021; last report 2020. Related affiliate Rainbow Bus Lines Inc (CT entity 0038564, USDOT 607879 also inactive) reg 5/16/1969 at same address; same officers. The 825 Bloomfield Ave input address matches Rainbow Bus Lines listings; both entities operated from Windsor by Viets family. Both USDOT records currently inactive.

name: Osseo Brooklyn School Bus Co
carrier_operation: Intrastate Passenger (MN PASSENG, Exempt for Hire)
officers: Scott Regan (owner, since 1995); founded by Robert J. Regan
registry_source: MN Secretary of State (not directly verified online; CPTDB Wiki historical record)
notes: USDOT 925645 (Osseo Brooklyn School Bus Co) is INACTIVE; last MCS-150 around 2016, last compliance review 8/11/2005, 102 power units, 125 drivers per historical data. Company rebranded as American Student Transportation operating under USDOT 2327051 (legal name AMERICAN STUDENT TRANSPORTATION OF MOUNDS VIEW INC, DBA American Student Transportation) at 1830 Radisson Rd NE, Blaine MN — ACTIVE with 198 power units, 183 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating (2014). Original Osseo-Brooklyn founded 1963 by Robert J. Regan; passed to son Scott Regan in 1995. Office at 200 2nd Ave NW Osseo until 1998, then 11800 95th Ave N Maple Grove. The Brooklyn Center address (4435 68th Ave N) in input does not match current SAFER address (now Blaine/Maple Grove).

name: Mcgough Bus Co Inc
officers: Henry McGough (founder/president); MaryAnn McGough (executive secretary/treasurer); Meghan McGough Paster (COO)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (not directly verified online); company history from NJBIA article
notes: USDOT 715978 for MCGOUGH BUS CO INC is INACTIVE per SAFER. SAFER keyword search returned no active McGough Bus carrier records. Company appears to still operate (yelp/yellowpages list as active operating school bus company). Founded by Henry McGough in 1977 (drove first bus 1977), incorporated 1979. Operates fleet of ~135-149 vehicles from hubs in Sewell and Glassboro/Camden NJ (1770 Hurffville Rd Glassboro and Sewell). The input address 530 Ellis St Glassboro is a known McGough Bus Co Inc location. McGough may operate via a successor or affiliated NJ-registered USDOT that does not appear under the McGough name; could not confirm an active USDOT number for the entity.

name: Cottage Hill Co
fmcsa_address: 321 W ST CHARLES RD, VILLA PARK, IL 60181
inc_date: 1950 (company founded as Cottage Hill Leasing; current entity Cottage Hill Operating Company)
officers: Heine family (founded by Harold Heine; Rick Heine listed historically); R. Beck Jr. as a contact (kabert.com)
registry_source: IL Secretary of State (not directly verified online; company website and BBB)
notes: USDOT 2532984 = COTTAGE HILL OPERATING COMPANY at 321 W St Charles Rd Villa Park IL 60181, MC-887141, active, interstate passenger authority, 109 power units, 72 drivers, MCS-150 10/17/2024, no safety rating assigned. Input address 148 W Saint Charles Rd #A Villa Park (rank 335) is on the same street; the FMCSA-registered address is 321 W St Charles Rd. Company founded 1950 by the Heine family as Cottage Hill Leasing, named after Elmhurst's original town name; has served Chicago Western Suburbs since. Current contact R. Beck Jr. (associated with kabert.com — likely Kabert Industries connection).
